data.body:
AC amendment: FP-SYNC tests must specify HTTP stub approach. Either: (a) use a Python http.server stub in a background process returning figma-file-response.json; or (b) design sync script to accept --figma-response-file flag. Document chosen approach in test file comments. Include stub setup/teardown in the cleanup trap.

AC amendment: RED confirmation comment must include per-test-case FAIL/SKIP breakdown, not just exit code. The comment must list each FP-* test case as FAIL or SKIP. If any case shows SKIP instead of FAIL, the task must be marked incomplete.
